instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the global program configuration
This function can only be called once as it creates the program's configuration accounts
It will fail if the accounts already exist

instructions.name: initialize_config_stores
docs: Initialize config stores for modules and gears
Can only be called by the authority

instructions.name: initialize_level_stats
docs: Initialize level statistics tracking (admin only)

instructions.name: initialize_loot_rewards
docs: Initialize the loot rewards system

accounts.name: loot_dbtc_vault
docs: DOGE_BTC vault for loot rewards

accounts.name: dbtc_mint
docs: DOGE_BTC mint (Token-2022)

instructions.name: initialize_mining
docs: Initialize mining by setting the token vault and starting timestamp
Can only be called once when mining_start_timestamp is 0

instructions.name: initialize_pvp_matchmaker
docs: Initialize the PvP matchmaker (admin only)

instructions.name: install_module_to_moonbase
docs: Create a new module instance for the user

instructions.name: join_pvp_game
docs: Join a PvP game

instructions.name: pvp_attack_turn

instructions.name: query_global_config
docs: Query function to get global config values for external programs

instructions.name: query_treasury_info
docs: Query function to get treasury info for external programs
Returns available balance after accounting for POL reserves and loot percentage

instructions.name: reinstall_module
docs: Reinstall a previously removed module instance

instructions.name: remove_module
docs: Remove a module instance from the moonbase

instructions.name: repair_moonbase
docs: Repair moonbase after PvP damage (free after cooldown or paid instantly)

instructions.name: toggle_game_active
docs: Toggle the PvP game active state (admin only)

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update the global configuration parameters
Can only be called by the current authority

instructions.name: update_dbtc_dist_per_slot
docs: Update DOGE_BTC distribution rate based on price oracle (can be called by anyone every hour)
We update DOGE_BTC distribution rate every 8 hrs based on price increase / decrease.
DOGE_BTC is swapped for SOL on raydium every hr for first 7 hrs and combined with DOGE_BTC from mining vault for last hr
and added to the LP pool, with LP tokens being burnt.
When lp_token_amount > 0: Admin override mode (requires authority signature)
When lp_token_amount = 0: Automatic calculation mode (anyone can call)

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig for admin authority verification

accounts.name: authority
docs: Authority (optional - only required when lp_token_amount > 0)

accounts.name: token_program_2022
docs: Token-2022 program for DOGE_BTC

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Standard token program for SOL

instructions.name: update_module
docs: Update an existing module configuration

instructions.name: update_slots_for_swap
docs: Update slots per hour configuration (admin only)

instructions.name: upgrade_module
docs: Upgrade a module instance

instructions.name: withdraw_sol_fees
docs: Withdraw collected SOL fees from the treasury
Called by MoonEconomy program, withdraws SOL and splits it into 3 parts:
1. For DOGE_BTC stakers
2. For liquidity providers
3. For game development
4. For devs
Internally, 10% is sent to loot rewards.

accounts.name: loot_rewards
docs: Loot rewards tracking account (required)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: User not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: FacilityAlreadyMaxSize
errors.msg: The facility is already at maximum size

errors.msg: The facility already has the maximum number of doges

errors.name: MaxDogesLessThanCurrent
errors.msg: Cannot set max doges less than current

errors.msg: Cannot set max tiles less than current

errors.name: MaxUpgradesLessThanCurrent
errors.msg: Cannot set max upgrades less than current

errors.msg: Moon doge mining account not provided

errors.name: ReferralCannotBeSameAsOwner
errors.msg: Referral pubkey cannot be the same as owner

errors.name: ModuleAlreadyMaxLevel

errors.msg: Module does not have any more space for doges

errors.name: ElectricityInUse
errors.msg: Cannot reduce electricity below what is currently in use

errors.name: UpdateTooEarly
errors.msg: Update too early - must wait at least 1 hour between updates

errors.name: InvalidFactionName
errors.msg: Invalid faction name: must be 1-16 characters

errors.name: MaxFactionsReached
errors.msg: Maximum number of factions reached (10 max)

errors.name: FactionAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Faction with this name already exists

errors.msg: Invalid faction ID: faction does not exist

errors.name: InvalidImageUrl
errors.msg: Invalid image URL: must be 1-64 characters

errors.name: TooManyFactionIds
errors.msg: Too many faction IDs specified for module

errors.msg: Module type does not match provided stats

errors.name: UserLevelTooLow
errors.msg: User level too low for this module

errors.name: FactionNotAllowed
errors.msg: User faction not allowed for this module

errors.name: MaxModuleInstancesReached
errors.msg: Maximum instances of this module already reached

errors.name: ModuleDamaged
errors.msg: Module is damaged and cannot function (requires repair)

errors.name: ModuleInstanceMaxLevel
errors.msg: Module instance already at maximum upgrade level

errors.name: ResearchNotReady
errors.msg: Research is not ready - cooldown period not elapsed

errors.name: ExpansionNotAvailable
errors.msg: Expansion not available: level requirement not met, already purchased, or inactive

errors.name: ExpansionAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Expansion already exists with this ID

errors.name: PlacementOutsideMoonbaseArea
errors.msg: Cannot place module outside current moonbase area - upgrade your moonbase first

errors.name: IncompleteTokenBurn

errors.name: StateMismatch
errors.msg: Runtime state does not match module stats type

errors.name: ModuleFullyRepaired
errors.msg: Module is already at full HP

errors.name: PlayerAlreadyInGame
errors.msg: Player is already in an active PvP game

errors.name: MaxGamesPerIndex
errors.msg: Maximum number of games per index reached

errors.name: GameAlreadyHasPlayerB
errors.msg: Game already has a player B

errors.name: GameNotExpired
errors.msg: Game has not expired yet (must be at least 30 minutes old)

errors.name: NotYourTurn
